# Capital Clean Care

> Capital Clean Care is a licensed, insured, family-owned eco-friendly house cleaning company serving Montgomery County and Frederick County in Maryland, Washington DC, and Northern Virginia. The company has cleaned 500+ homes, holds a 5.0-star rating, and has served the DMV region since 2015 using EPA Safer Choice certified, non-toxic, plant-based products that are safe for kids and pets.

Capital Clean Care uses flat-rate pricing (charged by the job, not the hour), sends background-checked teams, and backs every visit with a 24-hour satisfaction guarantee — if you are not happy, they re-clean the area free. Phone: (240) 704-2551. Hours: Monday–Saturday, 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM. Free quote: https://capitalcleancare.com/#quote

## Services

- [House Cleaning](https://capitalcleancare.com/services/house-cleaning): Routine cleaning that keeps your home consistently fresh and tidy between deeper sessions.
- [Deep Cleaning](https://capitalcleancare.com/services/deep-cleaning): An intensive, top-to-bottom clean that reaches every hidden corner and neglected surface.
- [Move In / Move Out Cleaning](https://capitalcleancare.com/services/move-out-cleaning): Comprehensive cleaning for property transitions; leave or arrive to a spotless space.
- [Post-Construction Cleaning](https://capitalcleancare.com/services/post-construction-cleaning): Specialized cleanup after renovations, removing construction dust, debris, and residue.
- [Recurring Cleaning](https://capitalcleancare.com/services/recurring-cleaning): Scheduled weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly cleaning plans with preferred pricing.
- [Eco-Friendly Cleaning](https://capitalcleancare.com/services/eco-friendly-cleaning): Non-toxic, plant-based cleaning that's safe for your family, pets, and the planet.
- [Airbnb & Short-Term Rental Cleaning](https://capitalcleancare.com/services/airbnb-cleaning): Fast, reliable turnover cleaning for Airbnb, VRBO, and short-term rental properties.
- [Office & Commercial Cleaning](https://capitalcleancare.com/services/office-cleaning): Professional commercial cleaning for offices, small businesses, and workspaces.

## Service Areas

- [Maryland](https://capitalcleancare.com/maryland): Rockville, Silver Spring, Bethesda, North Bethesda, Germantown, Gaithersburg, Potomac, North Potomac, Frederick, Urbana, Clarksburg, Damascus, Monrovia, Takoma Park, Columbia, Ellicott City, New Market, Mount Airy, Kensington, Chevy Chase, College Park, Laurel, Bowie, Wheaton, Boyds, Brookeville, Kentlands, Olney, Hyattsville, Burtonsville, and Montgomery Village (Montgomery, Frederick, Howard, and Prince George's Counties).
- [Washington DC](https://capitalcleancare.com/washington-dc): Northwest and Northeast DC, Capitol Hill, Georgetown, Dupont Circle, Adams Morgan, Downtown, Shaw, Columbia Heights, and Navy Yard.
- [Northern Virginia](https://capitalcleancare.com/virginia): Arlington, Fairfax, McLean, Alexandria, Falls Church, Vienna, Tysons, Reston, Herndon, and Annandale.

## Pricing

- [House Cleaning Prices in Maryland (2026)](https://capitalcleancare.com/blog/house-cleaning-prices-maryland-2026): Standard recurring cleaning runs $150–$180 (studio / 1-bedroom), $180–$230 (2-bedroom), $220–$290 (3-bedroom), $270–$360 (4-bedroom), and $340–$480+ (5+ bedroom); first-time or one-time cleans cost 20–40% more. Deep cleaning runs $200–$280 (2-bedroom), $260–$360 (3-bedroom), and $320–$450 (4-bedroom). Move-out cleaning is typically $250–$500 depending on size and condition. Bi-weekly recurring service is 10–15% off per visit.

- [Rockville, MD](https://capitalcleancare.com/locations/rockville-md): House and deep cleaning in Rockville, Montgomery County.

- [Washington, DC](https://capitalcleancare.com/washington-dc): House and deep cleaning across Washington DC.
- [Arlington, VA](https://capitalcleancare.com/locations/arlington-va): House and deep cleaning in Arlington, Northern Virginia.
